name: EKS Cluster
description: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service managed cluster

inputs.name: name
inputs.label: Cluster Name
inputs.description: Name of the EKS cluster

inputs.name: kubernetes_version
inputs.label: Kubernetes Version
inputs.description: Kubernetes version for the cluster

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.label: VPC ID
inputs.description: VPC where the cluster will be deployed

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.label: Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated subnet IDs for nodes/node groups

inputs.name: control_plane_subnet_ids
inputs.label: Control Plane Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Subnet IDs for EKS control plane ENIs (optional, uses subnet_ids if empty)

inputs.name: endpoint_private_access
inputs.label: Private API Endpoint
inputs.description: Enable private API server endpoint

inputs.name: endpoint_public_access
inputs.label: Public API Endpoint
inputs.description: Enable public API server endpoint

inputs.name: endpoint_public_access_cidrs
inputs.label: Public Access CIDRs
inputs.description: Comma-separated CIDRs that can access the public API endpoint

inputs.name: enable_cluster_creator_admin_permissions
inputs.label: Creator Admin Access
inputs.description: Give cluster creator admin permissions via access entry

inputs.name: authentication_mode
inputs.label: Authentication Mode
inputs.description: Cluster authentication mode

inputs.name: enabled_log_types
inputs.label: Control Plane Log Types
inputs.description: Comma-separated control plane log types to enable

inputs.name: enable_irsa
inputs.label: IRSA (IAM Roles for Service Accounts)
inputs.description: Create OIDC provider for IAM roles for service accounts

inputs.name: create_kms_key
inputs.label: Create KMS Key
inputs.description: Create a KMS key for cluster encryption

inputs.name: enable_kms_key_rotation
inputs.label: KMS Key Rotation
inputs.description: Enable automatic KMS key rotation

inputs.name: create_cloudwatch_log_group
inputs.label: CloudWatch Log Group
inputs.description: Create CloudWatch log group for control plane logs

inputs.name: cloudwatch_log_group_retention_in_days
inputs.label: Log Retention (days)
inputs.description: CloudWatch log group retention period in days

inputs.name: create_security_group
inputs.label: Create Cluster SG
inputs.description: Create a security group for the cluster

inputs.name: create_node_security_group
inputs.label: Create Node SG
inputs.description: Create a shared security group for node groups

inputs.name: ip_family
inputs.label: IP Family
inputs.description: IP family for Kubernetes pod and service addresses

inputs.name: service_ipv4_cidr
inputs.label: Service IPv4 CIDR
inputs.description: CIDR block for Kubernetes service IP addresses

inputs.name: deletion_protection
inputs.label: Deletion Protection
inputs.description: Prevent accidental cluster deletion

inputs.name: attach_encryption_policy
inputs.label: Encryption IAM Policy
inputs.description: Attach IAM policy for cluster encryption key

inputs.name: dataplane_wait_duration
inputs.label: Dataplane Wait Duration
inputs.description: Duration to wait after cluster is active before creating node groups
